summary.headline: Casebook Dataset captured 3 merged cases from 3 packs.
summary.portfolioHeadline: Prioritize profile-rollout first because it contains 1 novel casebook incident.
summary.mergeHeadline: Merged 3 casebook entries from 3 runnable packs, including 1 new case and 2 refreshed known cases.

gate.summary: Release gate is hold with 3 blockers, 4 warnings.
gate.nextAction: Stop the release and inspect the blocking packs first.
gate.headline: Release Gate: HOLD because 1 novel incidents, 1 regression-new incidents, 2 unowned runnable packs block the release.
checklist: Stop the release and inspect the blocking packs first.
Confirm the novel incidents before assuming the release is only repeating known failures.
Inspect candidate-only regression incidents before widening the rollout or release exposure.
Patch missing runbooks so recalled owners are not operating without playbooks.
Inspect recurring hotspot files because one code path may explain several packs at once.
